description.description: Detailed description of work, context, and requirements

profile.description: Task profile: feature (new capability), bugfix (defect fix), or review (code review)

scope.description: Directories/files this task should touch (e.g., apps/web/app/api/, packages/openai/src/)

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete first (e.g., [task-001, task-002])

acceptance_criteria.description: List of acceptance criteria that must be met

verification_command.description: Shell command to verify task completion (exit 0 = pass, e.g., 'pnpm test')

max_minutes.description: Maximum time allowed for task execution in minutes
